result.summary: Found 3 issues: one major missing element, one major readability issue, and one minor layout concern.

issues.description: The button in the top-right corner of the navigation bar appears to be a yellow/orange rectangle with no visible text or label, suggesting a rendering failure or missing button text (likely a Login or Sign Up CTA).
issues.suggestion: Ensure the button text renders correctly and has sufficient contrast against the yellow background. Check if the font failed to load or if the text color is set to white on a white/light background.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' overlay button is covering the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page, making critical terms and conditions partially unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'SCROLL DOWN' button so it does not overlap the legal disclaimer text, or place the disclaimer below the fold after the scroll indicator.

issues.description: The fine print disclaimer text appears extremely small and low-contrast against the white background, which may be difficult to read for users with visual impairments.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and ensure sufficient contrast ratio (at least 4.5:1) for the disclaimer text to meet WCAG accessibility standards.
